title: Potentilla leiotricha

intro: Potentilla leiotricha, also known as Burn Plantain, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The health benefits of Potentilla leiotricha include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can aid in wound healing, skin care, and the treatment of various infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Potentilla leiotricha include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat burns, wounds, and skin conditions.
